item.title: PSMC 将 DRAM 代工价格提升 45%，因 3D AI 代工的目标是 20% 的收入份额
item.summary: Major cloud service providers (CSPs) have front-loaded purchases of future DRAM capacity, and the global memory supply-demand gap is expected to last through 2027. Powerchip Semiconductor Manufacturing (PSMC) said on a July 14, 2026, online earnings call that it raised DRAM wafer start prices in July by about 45% from
